name: pdesk-hash-staleness
description: The P2 headline, live on the exe: TauriFsAdapter v2 restores staleness detection that P0 made existence-only. Build+bind a vault via IPC, add a file pointer, refresh once (status live AND lastKnownHash populated - proves v2 hashing, not the P0 existence-only path that left hash null), mutate the file OUT-OF-BAND, refresh again -> status flips to stale with the hash advanced. Rebinds the global adapter, so it runs after the read-only tests. Vault at <Qualia repo>/debug-logs/parity-vault-p2-stale/.

commands: (async () => { const step = (name, e) => { if (!e || e.ok !== true) throw new Error(name + ' failed: ' + JSON.stringify(e)); return e.value; }; const origAlert = window.alert; const origConfirm = window.confirm; window.alert = () => undefined; window.confirm = () => true; try { const solutionText = step('exportGraph', await window.__canaryExportGraph()); const notePath = step('write note.md', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault-p2-stale', 'note.md', '# v1 content\n')); const vaultDir = notePath.slice(0, notePath.lastIndexOf('/')); step('write .qualia.json', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault-p2-stale', '.qualia.json', solutionText)); const bind = step('bindVault', await window.__canaryBindVault(vaultDir)); if (!bind.solution) throw new Error('bindVault found no .qualia.json in ' + vaultDir); const adapter = step('fsAdapterInfo', window.__canaryGetFsAdapterInfo()); if (adapter.capabilities.hash !== true) throw new Error('adapter hash cap ' + adapter.capabilities.hash + ' - expected v2 true'); step('addNode', window.__canaryAddNode({ id: 'canary-stale-host', label: 'staleness host' })); step('addPointer', window.__canaryAddPointer({ nodeId: 'canary-stale-host', kind: 'file', path: 'note.md' })); step('refresh1', await window.__canaryRefreshPointers()); const p1 = step('getPointers1', window.__canaryGetNodePointers('canary-stale-host')); const ptr1 = p1.find(p => p.path === 'note.md'); if (!ptr1) throw new Error('pointer note.md not found after add'); if (ptr1.status !== 'live') throw new Error('first refresh status=' + ptr1.status + ' - expected live'); if (!ptr1.lastKnownHash) throw new Error('first refresh left lastKnownHash empty - v2 hashing not populating (P0 existence-only regression?)'); const V1_HASH = '8132d02a07c1386c43375464df644d35e7b264d93827bca35e408e71ce16e929'; if (ptr1.lastKnownHash !== V1_HASH) throw new Error('stat hash ' + ptr1.lastKnownHash + ' != offline known-answer ' + V1_HASH + ' - fs_stat_file digest/format drifted (would silently invalidate every prebaked lastKnownHash)'); const hash1 = ptr1.lastKnownHash; step('mutate note.md out-of-band', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault-p2-stale', 'note.md', '# v2 CHANGED - entirely different bytes\n')); step('refresh2', await window.__canaryRefreshPointers()); const p2 = step('getPointers2', window.__canaryGetNodePointers('canary-stale-host')); const ptr2 = p2.find(p => p.path === 'note.md'); if (!ptr2) throw new Error('pointer note.md missing after refresh2'); if (ptr2.status !== 'stale') throw new Error('after out-of-band mutation status=' + ptr2.status + ' - expected stale (v2 staleness detection; P0 existence-only would stay live)'); const V2_HASH = '9981f3d4fa62fe508d70e9d9ba2d18ba06e1108cbb5e1ea19b91313082456471'; if (ptr2.lastKnownHash !== V2_HASH) throw new Error('post-mutation lastKnownHash ' + ptr2.lastKnownHash + ' != offline known-answer ' + V2_HASH + ' (note: this also pins GRAPH_REFRESH write-through-on-stale semantics - if conflict-UX later keeps the old hash until user resolution, update this assert deliberately)'); return 'pass: v2 refresh detected staleness - live (hash ' + hash1.slice(0,8) + ') then stale (hash ' + ptr2.lastKnownHash.slice(0,8) + ') after out-of-band change'; } finally { window.alert = origAlert; window.confirm = origConfirm; } })()
